headline: Otis Worldwide: Short-Term Risks Remain, But Upside Potential Hard To Ignore (Rating Upgrade)
summary: Otis Worldwide trades well below its 5-year average multiple, with a forward P/E of 16.95x. Click here to read why OTIS stock is a Strong Buy.
